rationale: Workaround for server behavior change in 2.7.0 narrowing localhost exception; implementation adaptation, no spec rule violated.
Adding a missing getter method to DBCursor API; ergonomic improvement, no spec requirement involved.
Internal codec registry improvement to respect UUIDCodec; API ergonomics, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Removing dangerous legacy class that violated superclass contract; internal refactor/cleanup, no spec area.
Deprecating LazyWriteableDBObject; internal API lifecycle management, no spec area.
Deprecating unused DBCollection methods; internal API cleanup, no spec area involved.
Removing unused DBCollection methods in 3.0; API cleanup, no spec area.
Javadoc improvement for Lazy classes; documentation task, no spec area.
Changing ByteBuf to reference counting; internal memory management refactor, no spec rule.
Default MongoCollectionOptions behavior fix; API usability improvement, no spec area.
Adding DBRef encode/decode to DocumentCodec; internal codec feature, not a spec-defined behavior.
Unordered bulk writes must continue after errors per spec; driver stopped sending batches on first error.
Deprecating legacy request-pinning methods; API lifecycle change, no spec rule.
Socket buffer sizes not applied correctly; internal connection configuration bug, no spec rule.
Removing legacy request-pinning methods in 3.0; related links to CSHARP/PYTHON are parallel cleanup, not a behavioral divergence.
Connection sharing optimization in SingleConnectionBinding; internal resource management, no spec rule.
Auth failure with 2.8.0-rc0 and old driver 2.12.3; version compatibility issue, thin description, no specific spec rule cited.
Exposing cursor batches as first-class citizens for reactive streams backpressure; internal API design improvement.
Adding generic type parameter to getIndexes; API ergonomics improvement, no spec area.
Adding generic return type to executeCommand; API ergonomics improvement, no spec area.
Explain limit set to negative absolute value; matches shell behavior but no clear spec rule cited, description thin.
Not checking WriteConcernResult acknowledged flag; implementation bug causing exception, no specific spec rule cited.
Making WriteConcernResult abstract; internal class hierarchy design, empty description.
Server selection spec requires serverSelectionTimeoutMS; driver had no independent setting, reusing connectTimeout instead.
Implementing Closeable on MongoClient; Java language-binding ergonomic improvement, no spec area.
Making connection initialization non-blocking; internal async refactor, no spec rule.
Removing MongoFuture in favor of callbacks; internal async API refactor, no spec area.
Async operation connection leak; empty description, internal resource management bug, no spec rule.
Spurious IllegalStateException on in-flight ops after close; internal lifecycle bug, no spec rule.
ByteBuf leaked on socket exception in stream implementations; internal memory management bug, no spec rule.
Code style compliance improvement; build/tooling task, no spec area.
Adding Stream.open/openAsync methods; internal connection API extension, no spec rule.
IllegalStateException on reference count decrement in async find; internal reference counting bug, no spec rule.
Passing storageEngine field through to createCollection/createIndexes; new server feature support, no existing spec rule violated.
getCollectionNames returning null elements; implementation bug in result parsing, no spec rule cited.
IndexOutOfBoundsException in FindFluent#first with no results; implementation bug, no spec rule.
Async connection pool not handling asynchronously delivered exceptions; internal async error handling, no spec rule.
Codec missing for LinkedHashMap when embedded in Document; internal codec registry gap, no spec rule.
Adding new exception types for CRUD API writes; API design improvement, no spec rule violation cited.
Supporting cursor in listCollections/listIndexes for large result sets; new server feature adoption, not a prior spec violation.
Race condition in async aggregate/mapreduce to collection; internal async concurrency bug, no spec rule.
Exception translation bug throwing instead of calling callback, ignoring other exceptions; internal async callback bug.
TLS hostname verification impossible due to pre-resolved TCPAddr in DialFunc; Go-specific TLS API design limitation.
Spec/drivers requirement: drivers must not allow _ids with keys starting with $; summary says 'Drivers should not allow'.
Mutex unlock panic under load; internal concurrency bug in socket layer, no spec rule.
High CPU spin loop on down replica member; performance/resource bug in SDAM-area code, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
Indefinite hang waiting for auth nonce signal under concurrent auth; concurrency/deadlock bug, no spec rule.
UpsertUser fails with 'needs _id' on admin database; server-side constraint interaction, implementation bug.
Adding serviceHostname SASL param for Kerberos; feature addition for new server capability, no prior spec violation.
Adding 'How to Ask for Help' section to GitHub readme; documentation task.
